problem id: 28feff8e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHR(3)

examples:
  10010110 -> 00010010
  11111100 -> 00010011
  01100100 -> 00000000
  10100110 -> 00010000
  11011001 -> 00000011
  01000000 -> 00000000
  10101011 -> 00000100
  10110000 -> 00000010

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 00000000
